apps.title: St. Agnes Basilica — Empty Cathedral
apps.description: Stand alone inside a Gothic cathedral on a quiet afternoon. Stained glass, light shafts, dust motes, distant chant, 8-minute sun cycle, candle lighting.

apps.title: The Empty Cinema — Row 7
apps.description: A 1940s art-deco cinema, completely empty. Dust motes drift through the projector beam while procedural films play on the screen. Mood as deliverable.

apps.title: Bushwick Loft · Moved In Yesterday · 7:52 AM
apps.description: A nearly empty north-facing Bushwick loft at 7:52 AM. Sunbeams across painted wood stripes, a sleeping cat, a houseplant, one coffee cup. The potential-energy of a just-moved-in empty room.

apps.title: The Empty Office · 11:14 PM
apps.description: An open-plan corporate office at 11:14 PM. Most of the lights are off. One cubicle still glows blue from a forgotten monitor. Distant vacuum cleaner. The cleaning crew is somewhere on another floor. The whole building hums to itself.
